languages.text: Маленькая станция, затерянная в глубинах пустоты. Ее обитатели надеются быть полезными Империуму, иначе их дом пропадет с астронавигационных карт.

traits.locale_text: Маленькая станция, затерянная в глубинах Пустоты. Ее обитатели надеются быть полезными Империуму, иначе их дом пропадет с астронавигационных карт.
Маленькая станция, затерянная в глубинах пустоты. Ее обитатели надеются быть полезными Империуму, иначе их дом пропадет с астронавигационных карт.

languages.text: This small station is a grain of sand lost in the depths of the void. Its inhabitants hope to serve the Imperium lest their home be erased from the astrogation charts.
languages.original_text: Маленькая станция, затерянная в глубинах пустоты. Ее обитатели надеются быть полезными Империуму, иначе их дом пропадет с астронавигационных карт.

traits.locale_text: This station is like a grain of sand lost in the depths of the Void. Its habitants do their best to serve the Imperium lest their world is erased from the astrogation maps.
This station is like a grain of sand lost in the depths of the Void. Its habitants do their best to serve the Imperium lest their world is erased from the astrogation maps.
This small station is a grain of sand lost in the depths of the void. Its inhabitants hope to serve the Imperium lest their home be erased from the astrogation charts.

This small station is a grain of sand lost in the depths of the void. Its inhabitants hope to serve the Imperium lest their home be erased from the astrogation charts.

languages.text: Diese kleine Station ist ein Sandkorn, das sich in den Tiefen der Leere verliert. Ihre Bewohner hoffen, dem Imperium zu dienen, damit ihre Heimat nicht von den Astrogationskarten gelöscht wird.
languages.original_text: This small station is a grain of sand lost in the depths of the void. Its inhabitants hope to serve the Imperium lest their home be erased from the astrogation charts.

traits.locale_text: Diese kleine Station ist ein Sandkorn, das sich in den Tiefen der Leere verliert. Ihre Bewohner hoffen, dem Imperium zu dienen, damit ihre Heimat nicht von den Astrogationskarten gelöscht wird.

languages.text: Cette petite station est un grain de sable perdu dans les profondeurs du vide. Ses habitants espèrent servir l'Imperium de peur que leur maison ne soit effacée des cartes d'astrogation.
languages.original_text: This small station is a grain of sand lost in the depths of the void. Its inhabitants hope to serve the Imperium lest their home be erased from the astrogation charts.

traits.locale_text: Cette petite station est un grain de sable perdu dans les profondeurs du vide. Ses habitants espèrent servir l'Imperium de peur que leur maison ne soit effacée des cartes d'astrogation.

languages.text: Esta pequeña estación es un grano de arena perdido en las profundidades del vacío. Sus habitantes esperan servir al Imperio para que su hogar no sea borrado de las cartas de astrogación.
languages.original_text: This small station is a grain of sand lost in the depths of the void. Its inhabitants hope to serve the Imperium lest their home be erased from the astrogation charts.

traits.locale_text: Esta pequeña estación es un grano de arena perdido en las profundidades del vacío. Sus habitantes esperan servir al Imperio para que su hogar no sea borrado de las cartas de astrogación.

languages.text: Bu küçük istasyon, boşluğun derinliklerinde kaybolmuş bir kum tanesi. Sakinleri, evlerinin astrogasyon haritalarından silinmemesi için İmparatorluğa hizmet etmeyi umuyor.
languages.original_text: This small station is a grain of sand lost in the depths of the void. Its inhabitants hope to serve the Imperium lest their home be erased from the astrogation charts.

traits.locale_text: Bu küçük istasyon, boşluğun derinliklerinde kaybolmuş bir kum tanesi. Sakinleri, evlerinin astrogasyon haritalarından silinmemesi için İmparatorluğa hizmet etmeyi umuyor.
